name: Yellow Rice with Raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the dry ingredients (rice, turmeric, raisins, sugar, and salt).
2. Add 5 cups of water to the saucepan.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
4. Reduce the heat to low and cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
5. Simmer until all the water has evaporated and the rice is tender and fluffy.
Note: Do not leave the stove unattended while simmering. Turn off the heat when the water has fully evaporated and the rice is cooked through.
